items.name: Romastor 360°
items.description: Continuous 360° panning rotation for versatile rigging — smoothly repositioning frames, scrims and lighting around the set.
items.long_description: The Romastor 360° provides continuous, uninterrupted horizontal rotation for versatile rigging work. It allows frames, scrims, soft-boxes and lighting elements to be panned and repositioned smoothly and safely around a set, giving riggers and gaffers precise placement without re-rigging. Engineered for reliability and certified for safe operation at height.

items.name: Romastor Pan & Tilt
items.description: 360° pan with up to 70° tilt — versatile rigging for positioning frames, scrims and rigging loads at almost any angle.
items.long_description: The Romastor Pan & Tilt combines 360° horizontal rotation with up to 70° of tilt, giving riggers exceptional versatility when positioning frames, scrims, diffusion and lighting loads. Its dual movement lets crews place and angle rigging elements safely and precisely, adapting to complex set geometry without additional rigging passes.

items.name: Romastor 3D
items.description: Dual-axis full-sphere movement — maximum rigging versatility for frames, scrims and suspended loads in any orientation.
items.long_description: The Romastor 3D offers dual-axis rotation across both horizontal and vertical planes for total spatial freedom. It delivers the widest rigging versatility in the range, letting crews orient frames, scrims and suspended elements in virtually any direction — safely, repeatably and without re-rigging — for the most demanding set requirements.

items.name: Rotator
items.description: Continuous 360° vertical rotation in either direction — versatile, safe positioning of rigging loads, frames and scrims.
items.long_description: The Rotator provides continuous 360° vertical rotation in either direction, adding rigging versatility for positioning frames, scrims and suspended loads. Built for safe, controlled movement at height, it gives riggers a dependable way to orient and adjust rigging elements precisely on set.

items.name: Magni Panning Head
items.description: 180° single-axis movement, matched to our Manitou MRT fleet — versatile, safe rigging for frames, scrims and loads.
items.long_description: The Magni Panning Head delivers smooth 180° single-axis movement and pairs perfectly with our Manitou MRT telehandlers. It is built for versatile rigging — panning frames, scrims and lighting loads into position safely and precisely, giving crews flexible placement without compromising stability at height.

items.name: Alpha Truss
items.description: Specialist trussing and truss attachments — versatile, certified rigging for frames, scrims, lighting and structural loads.
items.long_description: The Alpha Truss system provides specialist trussing and truss attachments for complex rigging. It carries frames, scrims, lighting, rope lines and structural loads with versatility and safety at its core — designed, certified and crewed for demanding film and television rigging where stability and adaptability matter most.

items.name: Manitou MRT 2660 E
items.description: Australia’s first electric slewing telehandler — 6T capacity, 26M reach. Zero exhaust and fumes for safe indoor studio operation.
items.long_description: The Manitou MRT 2660 E is the first electric rotating telehandler in the country — a genuine industry first. With 6 tonne capacity and 26 metre reach, it matches the performance of its diesel counterpart while running completely emission-free. Because it produces no exhaust or fumes, it can be operated inside sound stages and studios where diesel machines simply cannot go — making it ideal for interior rigging, enclosed sets and emission-sensitive environments, with silent operation that suits live-sound shooting.

items.name: Manitou MRT 2660
items.description: Rotating telehandler with 6 tonne capacity and 26 metre reach — the workhorse of the fleet.
items.long_description: The workhorse of the fleet. The MRT 2660 rotating telehandler delivers 6 tonnes of capacity and 26 metres of reach with a 360 degree turret, handling the full spectrum of lifting, placement and rigging tasks across feature, TVC and series productions.

items.name: Manitou MRT 2150
items.description: Compact rotating telehandler — 5 tonne capacity, 21 metre reach. Versatile in limited-access environments.
items.long_description: A more compact rotating telehandler offering 5 tonnes of capacity and 21 metres of reach. Its smaller footprint makes it the versatile choice for limited-access environments and tighter set conditions without sacrificing rotating capability.

items.name: Magni TH6.20
items.description: Fixed-frame telehandler engineered for reliability and reach across film and construction applications.
items.long_description: The Magni TH6.20 is a fixed-frame telehandler delivering 6 tonnes of capacity and around 20 metres of reach. Dependable and straightforward, it covers everyday lifting and placement across film and construction applications.

items.name: Magni TH 5.5 19
items.description: Fixed-frame Magni telehandler — dependable lifting and placement for everyday production needs.
items.long_description: A fixed-frame Magni telehandler rated to roughly 5.5 tonnes and 19 metres of reach. A dependable everyday machine for lifting and placement where a rotating turret isn't required.

items.name: Design & Engineering
items.description: Structural engineers and designers with 100+ years combined film experience, building the solution that's right for your production.
items.long_description: Our in-house designers and structural engineers bring over 100 years of combined film experience to every brief. From concept to certified solution, we design custom rigs, adaptions and attachments built specifically around your production's needs.

items.name: Laser & Plasma Cutting
items.description: Full bed and tube laser cutting plus plasma facilities — precision fabrication in steel and aluminium.
items.long_description: A complete fabrication capability — full bed and tube laser cutting alongside plasma cutting facilities. Precision work in steel and aluminium, all under one roof in our Botany workshop, supporting both our own builds and custom client jobs.

items.name: Motion Control
items.description: Gimbals, winches and automated control systems for almost any in-camera film requirement.
items.long_description: Gimbals, winches and automated control systems engineered for almost any in-camera requirement. Our motion control specialists deliver repeatable, frame-accurate movement for the most demanding shots.

items.name: Rigging Services
items.description: Lighting, stunts and special effects rigging — designed, certified and crewed by specialists.
items.long_description: Specialist rigging for lighting, stunts and special effects — designed, certified and crewed by our experienced team. Safety-first solutions for the most ambitious set-ups, manned by people who've worked across every department.

media.caption: AlphaTruss rigging with suspended rope line

items.name: Atlas Copco XAS 375 DD6 Compressor
items.description: Heavy-duty portable diesel air compressor — 392 CFM free air delivery for SFX, pneumatics and rigging.
items.long_description: The Atlas Copco XAS 375 DD6 is a portable, oil-injected rotary-screw diesel air compressor delivering 392 CFM of free air at 102 psi working pressure. Powered by a reliable Deutz diesel engine, its silenced canopy makes it suitable for use near sound-sensitive sets, residential areas and night work — ideal for special effects, pneumatic rigs and air-hungry on-set requirements.

items.name: Denyo DCA-45USI2 Generator
items.description: Ultra-silenced 45 kVA three-phase diesel generator — film-grade quiet power.
items.long_description: The Denyo DCA-45USI2 is an ultra-silenced diesel generator built for the film industry, delivering 37 kVA at 50 Hz (45 kVA at 60 Hz) in three-phase operation. Powered by an Isuzu turbo-diesel engine with a brushless AVR alternator, its sound-insulated canopy keeps it whisper-quiet on set — perfect for powering lighting and equipment without intruding on sound recording.

items.name: Track Mats
items.description: Heavy-duty track mats for safe machine access and ground protection across difficult terrain.
items.long_description: Heavy-duty composite track mats that create safe, stable access for telehandlers and plant while protecting sensitive ground, turf and surfaces. Essential for moving machinery across grass, sand and uneven terrain on location without leaving a mark.

items.name: Hyundai Mighty Flatbed
items.description: Hyundai Mighty flatbed / tilt-tray truck for transporting attachments, plant and gear to set.
items.long_description: The Hyundai Mighty is a light-rigid flatbed and tilt-tray truck rated from 4.5t GVM (car licence) up to 6.5t. With a steel tray and drop-down sides, it's the everyday workhorse for moving attachments, plant and crew gear to and from set quickly and efficiently.

items.name: Hino Box Truck
items.description: Enclosed Hino box truck for secure, weatherproof transport of equipment and sensitive gear.
items.long_description: A Hino box (pantech) truck providing fully enclosed, weatherproof transport for attachments, tools and sensitive equipment. Ideal for keeping gear secure and protected between locations.

items.name: Scania P-Series Water Tanker
items.description: Scania P-Series water tanker for on-set water supply, dust suppression and effects.
items.long_description: A Scania P-Series water tanker supplying water on location for dust suppression, special effects, wet-downs and general production needs. A heavy-duty, reliable platform for high-volume water delivery to set.

items.name: Volvo Crane Truck
items.description: Volvo flatbed truck with mounted crane for loading, transport and on-site lifting.
items.long_description: A Volvo flatbed truck fitted with a mounted crane (HIAB), combining transport and lifting in one platform. Used to load and place attachments, plant and rigging on site without needing a separate crane.

items.name: 4x4 Ute
items.description: 4x4 tray-back ute for crew transport, gear runs and access across rough and remote location terrain.
items.long_description: A 4x4 tray-back ute for fast crew movement, equipment runs and reaching difficult or remote locations. Rugged all-terrain capability makes it the go-anywhere support vehicle for production days on location.

specs.label: Use
specs.value: Crew transport · gear runs · site access
